name: squashLoop
purpose: Endloses Stauchen und Dehnen — nicht-uniformes Skalieren (breiter + flacher; Squash-and-Stretch-Prinzip, compositor-guenstig).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-squashLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-squashLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: scaleX(1) scaleY(1) } to { transform: scaleX({{css params.scaleX}}) scaleY({{css params.scaleY}}) } }
